title: cymbalaria microcalyx subsp. alba
intro: Cymbalaria microcalyx subsp. alba is a rare white-flowering variant of the Dune Moneywort plant, a low-growing, annual or perennial herb native to Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Cymbalaria microcalyx subsp. alba include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
